description: MG996R metal-gear servo — functional (commanded move + measured response) AND visual EOL test.

functional.comment: Limits are per-measurement spec windows. The instrument reports raw readings; the host checks them against these. Tune to your golden-sample population.

operating_point.comment: Defect-recall priority: only PASS vision when P(OK) is high. Raising ok_threshold trades false-rejects (retest) for fewer escapes (missed defects).
